calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Harold Auerbach, Esq. for Plaintiff: Premier Staffing.
Plaintiff's witness: Sara Menke, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Pan's House of Horns, a corporation as follows:
Damages $56,270.70
Prejudgment Interest $12,971.00
Attorney's Fees $1,540.00
Costs $537.50 for a total of $71,319.20
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defts To Strike The Punitive Damage Claims Asserted In Pltfs' Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Dec-28-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT PAN'S HOUSE OF HORNS' Motion to Strike The Punitive Damages Claims: DENIED for failure to provide proof of service. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JJC/) Reporter: Janet Pond, CSR #5292
